connection_disconnected_tooltip: Connection interrupted — your edits are saved locally
connection_status_tooltip: Your edits are saved locally and will sync when you're back online.
publish_freeze_body_owner: Please wait while your story is being published. Editing is paused to ensure your content is saved correctly.
publish_freeze_body_collaborator: The owner is publishing the story. Editing is paused — your changes are safe and will resume when publishing is complete.
publish_freeze_error_body: Something went wrong. Your content has been saved. Please try again.
upgrade_freeze_body_owner: Applying the framework upgrade. Please do not close this tab.
upgrade_freeze_body_collaborator: The site owner is upgrading the framework. Editing is paused until they finish.
upgrade_freeze_error_body: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again from the upgrade page.
sidebar_disabled_tooltip: Collaboration is not available for this project
